description.intro: I'm a Systems Engineer focused on software development, with a particular interest in the modern web ecosystem. My goal is to contribute to real-world projects by building maintainable code, scalable solutions, and user-centered experiences.

card.title: Current Status
card.description: Available to join development teams and take on new technical challenges.

greeting.description: Hi, I'm Oscar Lozano, a Systems Engineer passionate about modern web development. While I enjoy working across the Full Stack, my greatest passion lies in Frontend development, where I create clean, interactive, and intuitive user interfaces that deliver meaningful user experiences.

intro.description: As a Junior Developer seeking my first professional opportunity, I continuously invest in my growth through self-learning, online courses, and bootcamps. I'm committed to strengthening my technical skills and contributing value to a development team from day one.

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.description: Building web projects and solutions with a strong focus on functionality, attention to detail, and user experience.

1.title: ControlFit
1.description: Gym management app with React and Django. Includes Admin and User roles, member management, and responsive design.

2.title: Hotel Alura Management
2.description: Desktop software for managing reservations and guests. Java backend using JDBC for efficient database handling.

3.title: TaskMaster
3.description: Productivity app to manage tasks in real time. Backend built with Django and MySQL, and a minimalist React frontend.

4.title: Institutional Management (Update)
4.description: Educational platform refactored with React and TypeScript, optimizing user experience and scalability.

5.title: EduBase
5.description: Full-Stack academic platform developed with HTML5 and Tailwind. It allows efficient data management and serves as a foundation for future developments.

6.title: FiadoApp
6.description: Commercial management platform for small neighborhood stores with sales dashboard, intelligent inventory and customer control.

2.challenge: Develop robust desktop software for comprehensive reservation and guest management, optimizing data handling through JDBC and ensuring a smooth user experience in a desktop environment.

3.challenge: Create a productivity application that allows real-time task management, focusing on data persistence, an efficient REST API, and a minimalist user interface that maximizes user focus.

videoProject.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support the video element.

1.description: Comprehensive gym management application with differentiated roles. Admin manages members, memberships, and users, while users manage their profiles and assigned members. Dynamic React frontend with Django REST Framework backend.
features: Authentication system with roles (Admin/User) implemented in Django.
Complete member management and membership assignment.
Dynamic control panel with real-time statistics.
Responsive design adapted to all devices.
1.performance: The application optimizes membership management by reducing registration time by 50% through real-time validations and local caching.

4.description: Architecture and comprehensive redesign of the educational management platform, optimizing critical workflows and modernizing the interface for a fluid and efficient user experience.
features: Implementation of scalable architecture based on modular components with React and TypeScript.
Refactoring of the service layer using Axios for robust and typed request management.
Development of a dynamic dashboard for real-time institutional metrics visualization.
4.performance: The update achieved a 40% reduction in load time through strategic code-splitting and lazy loading implementation.

5.description: Academic platform developed as a Full-Stack project in MinTic. It allows registering educational institutions and creating users with different roles, establishing the basis for a scalable solution.
features: User management by roles (administrator, teacher, student).
Frontend with HTML5 and Tailwind CSS for modern design.
RESTful API for efficient communication between frontend and backend.
5.performance: The platform provides optimal response times thanks to the clear separation between frontend and backend, allowing each layer to scale independently.

6.description: Comprehensive commercial management platform for small neighborhood stores, designed to optimize inventory, sales and customer control. Includes an interactive dashboard with daily activity metrics, allowing small business owners to have total control of their business from any device.
features: Interactive dashboard with real-time sales and daily activity metrics.
Smart inventory system with low stock alerts and automated management.
Credit customer control with payment and credit history.
Detailed reports on sales, revenue and business performance.
6.performance: The platform centralizes business administration in one place, reducing time spent on operational tasks by 60% and eliminating the need for multiple disconnected tools.

hobbies.title: Beyond the
hobbies.subtitle: terminal.
hobbies.description: Beyond the code, I am passionate about sports, especially futsal and physical training. I enjoy video games and music, hobbies that help me disconnect and recharge energy to keep building digital solutions with attention to detail and persistence.

contact.title: Do you have a project in mind?
contact.description: Let's talk about how I can help you materialize your technological vision.

placeholder.name: Anacleto Rupertino
placeholder.message: Tell me about your project, your needs, and how I can help you bring it to life.
